mapper.sql: pre_id, sales_id, phone, target_name, status, matched_channel_id, matched_at, expire_at, renew_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jst_sales_pre_register ( pre_id, sales_id, phone, target_name, status, matched_channel_id, matched_at, expire_at, renew_count, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{preId}, #{salesId}, #{phone}, #{targetName}, #{status}, #{matchedChannelId}, #{matchedAt}, #{expireAt}, #{renewCount}, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM jst_sales_pre_register WHERE phone = #{phone} AND status = 'pending' LIMIT 1
SELECT pre_id FROM jst_sales_pre_register WHERE status = 'pending' AND expire_at <= NOW() LIMIT 1000
mapper.update: UPDATE jst_sales_pre_register SET status = 'expired', update_time = NOW() WHERE pre_id IN #{id} AND status = 'pending'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jst_sales_pre_register WHERE sales_id = #{salesId} AND status = 'pending'
mapper.update: UPDATE jst_sales_pre_register SET status = 'matched', matched_channel_id = #{channelId}, matched_at = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE pre_id = #{preId} AND status = 'pending'
UPDATE jst_sales_pre_register SET status = 'expired', update_time = NOW() WHERE sales_id = #{salesId} AND status = 'pending'
